title: Basin Day beautifies the Bay
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Advertorial","html":"Advertorial"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - On 27 March, Saint Mark's & Co in Plettenberg Bay hosted its first ever Basin Day.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - On 27 March, Saint Mark's & Co in Plettenberg Bay hosted its first ever Basin Day."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The event aimed to celebrate beauty, introduce clients to exceptional hair products, and launch the salon in style. The day was a huge success, thanks to the support of dedicated individuals and the involvement of the local community.","html":"The event aimed to celebrate beauty, introduce clients to exceptional hair products, and launch the salon in style. The day was a huge success, thanks to the support of dedicated individuals and the involvement of the local community."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The driving forces behind the event were Marius Barnard and Theo Myburgh, who poured their passion and dedication into the salon and created an environment where clients can feel beautiful, both inside and out."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"They collaborated with sponsors and community members who share their passion for beautifying the community. One of the main sponsors was Milkshake, a salon professional hair care brand renowned for its high-quality products, that sponsored the treatments offered to clients during Basin Day. Additionally, Face Facts, the salon's neighbouring establishment, contributed vouchers for massages and other indulgent services.","html":"They collaborated with sponsors and community members who share their passion for beautifying the community. One of the main sponsors was Milkshake, a salon professional hair care brand renowned for its high-quality products, that sponsored the treatments offered to clients during Basin Day. Additionally, Face Facts, the salon's neighbouring establishment, contributed vouchers for massages and other indulgent services."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The day was designed to provide an array of delightful experiences for clients. From 09:30 am until 18:00, representatives from Milkshake treated clients to personalised consultations and advice on their hair condition.","html":"The day was designed to provide an array of delightful experiences for clients. From 09:30 am until 18:00, representatives from Milkshake treated clients to personalised consultations and advice on their hair condition."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Clients who participated paid a minimum fee for a wash and blow-dry, receiving a complementary treatment with this service. The salon was buzzing with excitement as clients eagerly awaited their turn.","html":"Clients who participated paid a minimum fee for a wash and blow-dry, receiving a complementary treatment with this service. The salon was buzzing with excitement as clients eagerly awaited their turn."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"To add an extra element of surprise and gratitude, Basin Day featured balloons with hidden prizes.","html":"To add an extra element of surprise and gratitude, Basin Day featured balloons with hidden prizes."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The response from the community was overwhelmingly positive. Clients expressed their appreciation for the personalised approach and top-quality beauty services provided by Saint Mark's & Co.","html":"The response from the community was overwhelmingly positive. Clients expressed their appreciation for the personalised approach and top-quality beauty services provided by Saint Mark's & Co."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
